summary: Frontend-only verification of the new Vortex Event Ticker on https://nullai-mainnet.preview.emergentagent.com. All 12 review-request assertions passed: section renders between TokenomicsPanel and Footer, header + subtitle copy correct, shell + empty state visible with exact 'AWAITING EVENTS · VORTEX IDLE' text (expected because the NULLAI token on Base mainnet currently has zero Transfer events), polling cadence '20s · last 500 blocks' present, refresh button clickable and resets last-sync age to 'now ago', status indicator animated (animate-pulse + animate-ping found), no React key warnings or console errors emitted during initial eth_blockNumber + eth_getLogs round-trip, and Tokenomics + Footer continue to render unchanged (regression clean). Row testids + BaseScan link path were code-verified (no row in live state to click, which matches on-chain truth).
critical_code_review_comments: useVortexEvents.js rawHexToHumanNumber: slice(0, 2) for fracPart always truncates to 2 decimals regardless of original magnitude — harmless for display but means very small amounts below 0.01 never show fractional detail. Already mitigated in VortexEventTicker.formatAmount via toExponential for n<0.01.

useVortexEvents.js fetchOnce uses Date.now() as JSON-RPC id inside a batch of parallel requests (eth_getBlockByNumber Promise.all). Non-unique ids within the same millisecond are technically allowed by spec but some strict gateways reject duplicates — consider a monotonically increasing counter. Not currently causing failures.
VortexEventTicker.jsx uses ev.id = `${txHash}-${logIndex}` as React key (OK per spec 'keyed by transactionHash+logIndex'); correctly matches requirement.

Section testid 'vortex-ticker-section', shell 'vortex-ticker-shell', empty 'vortex-ticker-empty', refresh btn 'vortex-ticker-refresh-btn', list 'vortex-ticker-list', and per-row 'vortex-ticker-row-<id>' all present — good testability.
Refresh button has aria-label and hover color, but relies on hover for affordance — a subtle border or focus ring would improve accessibility. Minor.
seed_data_creation: None. Token contract on Base mainnet has 0 Transfer events (verified) — empty state is the correct live outcome.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ticker is live at anchor #vortex-ticker. When the first real Transfer lands on Base, flip test to assert vortex-ticker-list + at least one vortex-ticker-row-<txHash>-<logIndex> plus a basescan.org/tx/<hash> anchor. Classification rules live in useVortexEvents.classifyTransfer (BURN / TAX / VORTEX / FLOW). RPC failover chain is BASE_RPC_URLS in /app/frontend/src/config/constants.js; preferred RPC during this run was base.publicnode.com (seen in tokenomics footer).
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Empty state is the expected and correct on-chain outcome.
